Paper_or_discovery: Ethernet: Distributed packet switching for local computer networks
Authors: Robert M. Metcalfe; David R. Boggs
Billionaire_rationale: Ethernet became a core LAN and datacenter networking standard; the Ethernet hardware ecosystem is a large multi-billion-dollar market.
Notes: Platform impact; revenue is ecosystem-wide rather than paper-owned.

Paper_or_discovery: New directions in cryptography / Diffie-Hellman key exchange
Authors: Whitfield Diffie; Martin Hellman
Billionaire_rationale: Foundational to secure Internet communications, TLS/PKI, e-commerce, VPNs, and cybersecurity infrastructure.
Notes: Commercial impact is diffuse across Internet security and digital commerce.

Paper_or_discovery: A method for obtaining digital signatures and public-key cryptosystems / RSA
Authors: Ronald Rivest; Adi Shamir; Leonard Adleman
Billionaire_rationale: RSA became foundational to digital signatures, certificates, secure software, payments, and enterprise security.
Notes: Commercial impact is mainly through standards and implementations.

Paper_or_discovery: The case for the reduced instruction set computer
Authors: David A. Patterson; David R. Ditzel
Billionaire_rationale: RISC ideas influenced modern processors, including Arm-based CPUs and embedded/mobile chips shipped at massive scale.
Notes: Attribution is architecture-platform level.

Paper_or_discovery: LiCoO2 cathode for rechargeable lithium batteries
Authors: Koichi Mizushima; Philip C. Jones; Philip J. Wiseman; John B. Goodenough
Billionaire_rationale: Layered lithium cobalt oxide became a central lithium-ion cathode chemistry, enabling portable electronics and later battery industries.
Notes: One of the clearest battery billionaire papers.

Paper_or_discovery: Chemical amplification in the design of dry developing resist materials
Authors: Hiroshi Ito; C. Grant Willson; Jean M. J. Frechet
Organization_type: Private company research lab plus academic collaborators
Billionaire_rationale: Chemical amplification became central to advanced lithography from deep-UV to EUV, underpinning semiconductor manufacturing.
Notes: Commercial impact is across semiconductor fabs and materials suppliers.

Paper_or_discovery: Permanent magnet materials based on the rare earth-iron-boron tetragonal compounds
Authors: Masato Sagawa; S. Fujimura; N. Togawa; H. Yamamoto; Y. Matsuura
Billionaire_rationale: NdFeB magnets became critical for EV motors, wind turbines, hard disks, robotics, and consumer electronics.
Notes: Large materials-platform impact.

Paper_or_discovery: Glyphosate-tolerant plant cells
Authors: R. T. Comai; D. Facciotti; W. R. Hiatt; G. Thompson; R. E. Rose; D. M. Stalker
Billionaire_rationale: Helped enable herbicide-tolerant genetically modified crops and associated seed/herbicide markets.
Notes: Platform link to GM crop commercialization.

Paper_or_discovery: Enzymatic amplification of beta-globin genomic sequences and restriction site analysis for diagnosis of sickle cell anemia
Authors: Randall K. Saiki; Stephen Scharf; Fred Faloona; Kary Mullis; Glenn Horn; Henry Erlich; Norman Arnheim
Billionaire_rationale: PCR became foundational to diagnostics, sequencing, forensics, pathogen testing, and biotech R&D.
Notes: One of the clearest biology-platform billionaire papers.

Paper_or_discovery: Cloning and expression of the human erythropoietin gene
Authors: Fu-Kuen Lin; Shwu Suggs; Chia-Huei Lin; Joan K. Browne; Randall Smalling; James C. Egrie; Kenneth K. Chen; Gary M. Fox; Frank Martin; Zonzang Stabinsky; et al.
Billionaire_rationale: Recombinant EPO became one of the first blockbuster biologics and created a large biologics market segment.
Notes: Direct drug-class revenue.

Paper_or_discovery: Filamentous fusion phage: novel expression vectors that display cloned antigens on the virion surface
Authors: George P. Smith
Billionaire_rationale: Phage display became a key method for antibody discovery and optimization, supporting multiple blockbuster antibody drugs.
Notes: Technology-platform revenue across many drugs.

Paper_or_discovery: Replacing the complementarity-determining regions in a human antibody with those from a mouse
Authors: Paul T. Jones; Paul H. Dear; Jonathan Foote; Michael S. Neuberger; Greg Winter
Billionaire_rationale: Humanization helped make therapeutic antibodies commercially viable by reducing immunogenicity.
Notes: Critical enabling paper for antibody therapeutics.

Paper_or_discovery: DNA sequencing with chain-terminating inhibitors
Authors: Frederick Sanger; Steven Nicklen; Alan R. Coulson
Billionaire_rationale: Sanger sequencing powered decades of genomics, diagnostics, biotech, and the Human Genome Project.
Notes: Outside direct product ownership but foundational.

Paper_or_discovery: ML-236B / compactin and inhibition of HMG-CoA reductase
Authors: Akira Endo; Masao Kuroda; Yoshio Tsujita; collaborators
Billionaire_rationale: Statins became among the most commercially successful drug classes, including multi-billion-dollar products such as Lipitor.
Notes: Direct drug-class revenue.

Paper_or_discovery: Design of specific inhibitors of angiotensin-converting enzyme; captopril
Authors: Miguel A. Ondetti; Barry Rubin; David W. Cushman
Billionaire_rationale: Captopril launched the ACE-inhibitor class, followed by multiple blockbuster cardiovascular medicines.
Notes: Direct drug-class revenue.

Paper_or_discovery: Human breast cancer: correlation of relapse and survival with amplification of the HER-2/neu oncogene
Authors: Dennis Slamon; Geoffrey Clark; Steven Wong; Wendy Levin; Axel Ullrich; William McGuire
Billionaire_rationale: HER2 biology enabled Herceptin and later HER2-targeted oncology, creating multi-billion-dollar annual drug revenues.
Notes: Biomarker-to-drug platform.

Field_or_platform: GLP-1 incretin biology / diabetes and obesity medicines
Paper_or_discovery: GLP-1 incretin biology papers enabling GLP-1 receptor agonists
Authors: Svetlana Mojsov; Joel Habener; Daniel Drucker; collaborators
Billionaire_rationale: GLP-1 biology underpins blockbuster diabetes and obesity drugs such as semaglutide products.
Notes: Paper family rather than one isolated paper.

Paper_or_discovery: Low-noise erbium-doped fibre amplifier operating at 1.54 micrometre
Authors: R. J. Mears; L. Reekie; I. M. Jauncey; D. N. Payne
Billionaire_rationale: EDFAs became core technology for long-haul optical fiber networks and Internet backbones.
Notes: Infrastructure-platform revenue, not single-product revenue.

Paper_or_discovery: Organic electroluminescent diodes
Authors: Ching W. Tang; Steven A. VanSlyke
Billionaire_rationale: This paper launched practical OLED displays used in phones, TVs, wearables, and lighting/display products.
Notes: Clear materials-to-product platform.

Paper_or_discovery: Transgenic plants protected from insect attack
Authors: Marc Vaeck; An Reynaerts; Herman Hofte; Serge Jansens; Marc De Beuckeleer; Celestine Dean; Maria Zabeau; Marc Van Montagu; Jan Leemans
Billionaire_rationale: Bt crops became one of the major genetically modified crop platforms with large seed and crop-protection revenues.
Notes: Platform link to GM crop commercialization.

Paper_or_discovery: Giant magnetoresistance of (001)Fe/(001)Cr magnetic superlattices
Authors: M. N. Baibich; J. M. Broto; Albert Fert; F. Nguyen Van Dau; F. Petroff; P. Etienne; G. Creuzet; A. Friederich; J. Chazelas
Billionaire_rationale: GMR revolutionized hard-disk read heads and enabled major increases in magnetic storage density.
Notes: Major physics-to-hardware commercialization case.

Paper_or_discovery: 22.8% efficient silicon solar cell / passivated emitter rear cell architecture
Authors: Andrew Blakers; Aihua Wang; A. M. Milne; Jianhua Zhao; Martin A. Green
Billionaire_rationale: PERC became a dominant commercial silicon solar-cell architecture and helped underpin modern PV manufacturing.
Notes: Commercial impact through global solar manufacturing.

Paper_or_discovery: Papillomavirus L1 major capsid protein self-assembles into virus-like particles
Authors: Reinhard Kirnbauer; Jian Zhou; John T. Schiller; Douglas R. Lowy; collaborators
Billionaire_rationale: HPV VLPs enabled vaccines such as Gardasil and Cervarix, with multi-billion-dollar annual vaccine revenues.
Notes: Direct vaccine-platform revenue.

Paper_or_discovery: Near Shannon limit error-correcting coding and decoding: Turbo-codes
Authors: Claude Berrou; Alain Glavieux; Punya Thitimajshima
Organization_type: Public or state-linked academic engineering school
Billionaire_rationale: Turbo codes were adopted in major wireless and satellite communication standards, enabling higher-capacity digital networks.
Notes: Standards impact, revenue distributed across telecom systems.

Paper_or_discovery: Active pixel sensors: are CCDs dinosaurs?
Authors: Eric R. Fossum
Organization_type: Government lab plus private nonprofit contractor
Billionaire_rationale: CMOS image sensors enabled cheap, low-power digital cameras in phones, cars, robotics, security, and IoT.
Notes: Clear sensor-platform commercialization.

Paper_or_discovery: Candela-class high-brightness InGaN/AlGaN double-heterostructure blue-light-emitting diodes
Authors: Shuji Nakamura; Takashi Mukai; Masayuki Senoh
Billionaire_rationale: Blue LEDs enabled white LED lighting and modern LED displays, both very large global markets.
Notes: Clear paper-to-hardware platform.

Paper_or_discovery: The World-Wide Web
Authors: Tim Berners-Lee; Robert Cailliau; Ari Luotonen; Henrik Frystyk Nielsen; Arthur Secret
Billionaire_rationale: The Web became the dominant platform for Internet publishing, advertising, e-commerce, SaaS, and cloud services.
Notes: The paper followed the invention but documented a trillion-dollar-scale platform.

Paper_or_discovery: Layered space-time architecture for wireless communication in a fading environment when using multi-element antennas
Authors: Gerard J. Foschini
Billionaire_rationale: MIMO became central to Wi-Fi, 4G, and 5G standards and telecom equipment markets.
Notes: Standards and infrastructure impact.

Paper_or_discovery: Effects of a selective inhibitor of the Abl tyrosine kinase on the growth of Bcr-Abl positive cells
Authors: Brian Druker; Thomas Buchdunger; Nicholas Lydon; collaborators
Billionaire_rationale: This helped establish molecularly targeted cancer therapy; Gleevec/Glivec became a blockbuster drug.
Notes: Direct drug-product revenue.

Paper_or_discovery: Enhancement of antitumor immunity by CTLA-4 blockade
Authors: Dana R. Leach; Matthew F. Krummel; James P. Allison
Billionaire_rationale: CTLA-4 blockade helped launch immune-checkpoint oncology, now a very large drug class.
Notes: Foundational immuno-oncology paper.

Paper_or_discovery: Phospho-olivines as positive-electrode materials for rechargeable lithium batteries
Authors: A. K. Padhi; K. S. Nanjundaswamy; John B. Goodenough
Billionaire_rationale: LiFePO4 became a major low-cost lithium-ion cathode chemistry for EVs and stationary storage.
Notes: One of the clearest battery billionaire papers.

Paper_or_discovery: Long short-term memory
Authors: Sepp Hochreiter; Jurgen Schmidhuber
Billionaire_rationale: LSTMs became core to industrial speech, translation, handwriting, and early sequence AI products before transformers.
Notes: Revenue attribution is indirect across deployed AI products.

Paper_or_discovery: The PageRank citation ranking: bringing order to the Web
Authors: Lawrence Page; Sergey Brin; Rajeev Motwani; Terry Winograd
Billionaire_rationale: PageRank was central to Google's early search advantage and the search advertising platform that followed.
Notes: Platform revenue mainly through Google/Alphabet advertising and services.

Paper_or_discovery: Potent and specific genetic interference by double-stranded RNA in Caenorhabditis elegans
Authors: Andrew Fire; SiQun Xu; Mary K. Montgomery; Steven A. Kostas; Samuel E. Driver; Craig C. Mello
Billionaire_rationale: RNAi enabled a new therapeutic modality and research-tool ecosystem, including approved RNAi medicines.
Notes: Research-tool plus therapeutics platform.

Paper_or_discovery: FinFET: a self-aligned double-gate MOSFET scalable to 20 nm
Authors: Digh Hisamoto; Wen-Chin Lee; Jakub Kedzierski; Hideki Takeuchi; Kazuya Asano; Charles Kuo; Erik Anderson; Tsu-Jae King Liu; Jeffrey Bokor; Chenming Hu
Billionaire_rationale: FinFET/tri-gate devices became the mainstream transistor architecture for advanced CPUs, GPUs, and mobile SoCs.
Notes: Core semiconductor device architecture.

Paper_or_discovery: Tumor-associated B7-H1 promotes T-cell apoptosis: a potential mechanism of immune evasion
Authors: Haidong Dong; Scott E. Strome; E. L. Salomao; H. Tamura; F. Hirano; D. B. Flies; P. C. Roche; J. Lu; et al.
Organization_type: Academic medical and nonprofit research institutions
Billionaire_rationale: PD-1/PD-L1 blockade became a dominant oncology platform with tens of billions in annual drug sales.
Notes: Checkpoint immunotherapy platform.

Paper_or_discovery: Mutations in PCSK9 cause autosomal dominant hypercholesterolemia
Authors: Marianne Abifadel; Catherine Boileau; Jean-Pierre Rabes; et al.
Billionaire_rationale: This genetics paper opened the PCSK9 inhibitor drug class for LDL cholesterol lowering.
Notes: Human genetics-to-drug platform.

Field_or_platform: Google File System / cloud data infrastructure
Paper_or_discovery: The Google File System
Authors: Sanjay Ghemawat; Howard Gobioff; Shun-Tak Leung
Billionaire_rationale: GFS shaped Google-scale storage and inspired Hadoop/cloud data infrastructure.
Notes: Infrastructure-platform impact.

Paper_or_discovery: MapReduce: simplified data processing on large clusters
Authors: Jeffrey Dean; Sanjay Ghemawat
Billionaire_rationale: MapReduce became a defining distributed-computing abstraction and influenced Hadoop, analytics platforms, and cloud data processing.
Notes: Infrastructure-platform impact.

Paper_or_discovery: Suppression of RNA recognition by Toll-like receptors: the impact of nucleoside modification and the evolutionary origin of RNA
Authors: Katalin Kariko; Michael Buckstein; Houping Ni; Drew Weissman
Billionaire_rationale: Nucleoside-modified mRNA became key to mRNA vaccines and therapeutics, including COVID-19 vaccines with massive sales.
Notes: One of the clearest modern biopharma platform papers.

Paper_or_discovery: Bigtable: a distributed storage system for structured data
Authors: Fay Chang; Jeffrey Dean; Sanjay Ghemawat; Wilson C. Hsieh; Deborah A. Wallach; Mike Burrows; Tushar Chandra; Andrew Fikes; Robert E. Gruber
Billionaire_rationale: Bigtable influenced NoSQL databases, cloud storage systems, and large-scale data infrastructure.
Notes: Infrastructure-platform impact.

Field_or_platform: Sequencing by synthesis with reversible terminators
Paper_or_discovery: Four-color DNA sequencing by synthesis using cleavable fluorescent nucleotide reversible terminators
Authors: Jingyue Ju; Ju Jingyue; et al.
Billionaire_rationale: Reversible-terminator sequencing by synthesis underpins Illumina/Solexa-style next-generation sequencing platforms.
Notes: Platform revenue through sequencing instruments, consumables, and services.

Paper_or_discovery: Rational design of cationic lipids for siRNA delivery
Institution_at_publication: Tekmira; Alnylam; University of British Columbia
Authors: Sarah C. Semple; Akin Akinc; Jeremy Chen; Anders P. Sandhu; Barbara L. Mui; Celia K. Cho; D. W. Y. Sah; David Stebbing; et al.; Pieter R. Cullis; Ian MacLachlan
Billionaire_rationale: LNP delivery became essential for RNA medicines, including siRNA drugs and mRNA COVID vaccines.
Notes: Delivery-platform revenue across RNA medicines.

Paper_or_discovery: Discovery of a beta-d-2'-deoxy-2'-alpha-fluoro-2'-beta-C-methyluridine nucleotide prodrug for HCV therapy
Authors: Michael J. Sofia; David Bao; Wen Chang; Jinfa Du; Deepak Nagarathnam; Shalini Rachakonda; et al.
Billionaire_rationale: Sofosbuvir enabled curative HCV regimens and generated very large drug revenues after Gilead's acquisition of Pharmasset.
Notes: Direct drug-product revenue.

Paper_or_discovery: T cells with chimeric antigen receptors have potent antitumor effects and can establish memory in patients with advanced leukemia
Authors: Michael Kalos; Bruce L. Levine; David L. Porter; Carl H. June; et al.
Billionaire_rationale: CAR-T created a new living-drug platform with approved multi-billion-dollar cell therapy markets.
Notes: Direct therapeutic-platform revenue.

Paper_or_discovery: A programmable dual-RNA-guided DNA endonuclease in adaptive bacterial immunity
Institution_at_publication: UC Berkeley; Umea University; University of Vienna; Max Planck ecosystem
Authors: Martin Jinek; Krzysztof Chylinski; Ines Fonfara; Michael Hauer; Jennifer A. Doudna; Emmanuelle Charpentier
Organization_type: Public universities and public research institutes
Billionaire_rationale: CRISPR became a platform for research tools, diagnostics, agriculture, and gene therapy.
Notes: Foundational genome-editing platform.

Paper_or_discovery: ImageNet classification with deep convolutional neural networks / AlexNet
Authors: Alex Krizhevsky; Ilya Sutskever; Geoffrey Hinton
Billionaire_rationale: AlexNet triggered the modern deep-learning wave in computer vision and helped drive AI deployment and GPU demand.
Notes: Platform impact across AI products and hardware.

Paper_or_discovery: Deep residual learning for image recognition / ResNet
Authors: Kaiming He; Xiangyu Zhang; Shaoqing Ren; Jian Sun
Billionaire_rationale: Residual networks became a default architecture across computer vision and perception stacks, supporting industrial AI and vision products.
Notes: AI platform impact; revenue indirect.

Paper_or_discovery: You Only Look Once: unified, real-time object detection
Institution_at_publication: University of Washington; Allen Institute for AI; Facebook AI Research
Authors: Joseph Redmon; Santosh Divvala; Ross Girshick; Ali Farhadi
Organization_type: Public university plus nonprofit and private AI labs
Billionaire_rationale: YOLO made real-time object detection deployable across cameras, robotics, autonomous systems, retail analytics, and edge AI.
Notes: Revenue attribution is diffuse across deployments.

Paper_or_discovery: Attention Is All You Need
Authors: Ashish Vaswani; Noam Shazeer; Niki Parmar; Jakob Uszkoreit; Llion Jones; Aidan Gomez; Lukasz Kaiser; Illia Polosukhin
Billionaire_rationale: Transformers underpin modern LLMs and generative AI, creating major revenues across AI software, cloud, and GPU hardware.
Notes: One of the clearest recent technology-platform billionaire papers.

Paper_or_discovery: BERT: pre-training of deep bidirectional transformers for language understanding
Authors: Jacob Devlin; Ming-Wei Chang; Kenton Lee; Kristina Toutanova
Billionaire_rationale: BERT became a dominant pretrained-language-model architecture widely deployed in search, NLP products, enterprise AI, and later transformer ecosystems.
Notes: AI platform impact; revenue indirect.

Paper_or_discovery: Elliptic curve cryptosystems
Authors: Neal Koblitz; Victor S. Miller
Organization_type: Public university and private company research lab
Billionaire_rationale: ECC became central to mobile security, TLS, cryptocurrencies, and constrained-device cryptography.
Notes: Candidate because commercial revenue is bundled into broader cybersecurity and commerce.

Field_or_platform: Quantum dots / QD displays and nanomaterials
Paper_or_discovery: Colloidal semiconductor nanocrystals / quantum dots paper family
Institution_at_publication: Bell Labs; University of California, Berkeley
Authors: Louis E. Brus; A. Paul Alivisatos; collaborators
Organization_type: Private company lab plus public university
Billionaire_rationale: Quantum dots became a commercial display, imaging, and nanomaterials platform; QD/QLED markets are multi-billion-dollar.
Notes: Candidate because it is a paper family rather than one isolated origin paper.

Paper_or_discovery: ROS: an open-source Robot Operating System
Institution_at_publication: Stanford University; Willow Garage; University of Southern California ecosystem
Authors: Morgan Quigley; Ken Conley; Brian Gerkey; Josh Faust; Tully Foote; Jeremy Leibs; Rob Wheeler; Andrew Y. Ng
Organization_type: Public university plus private robotics lab
Billionaire_rationale: ROS became a de facto robotics software platform across research, industrial robotics, autonomous mobile robots, and startups.
Notes: Candidate because ROS is open-source and direct monetization is indirect.

Paper_or_discovery: Probabilistic SLAM / simultaneous localization and mapping paper family
Authors: Sebastian Thrun; Wolfram Burgard; Dieter Fox; collaborators
Organization_type: Public universities and mixed robotics labs
Billionaire_rationale: SLAM became central to warehouse robots, drones, robot vacuums, AR, and autonomous vehicles.
Notes: Candidate because revenue is spread across many products and papers.

Paper_or_discovery: Highly accurate protein structure prediction with AlphaFold
Authors: John Jumper; Richard Evans; Alexander Pritzel; Tim Green; Michael Figurnov; Olaf Ronneberger; Kathryn Tunyasuvunakool; Russ Bates; et al.; Demis Hassabis
Billionaire_rationale: AlphaFold2 changed structural biology and drug-discovery workflows, with potential high commercial impact.
Notes: Candidate because direct more-than-US$1B revenue attribution is still less clear.

Paper_or_discovery: Denoising diffusion probabilistic models
Institution_at_publication: University of California, Berkeley; Google ecosystem
Authors: Jonathan Ho; Ajay Jain; Pieter Abbeel
Organization_type: Public university plus private company ecosystem
Billionaire_rationale: Diffusion models underpin major image and video generation tools and a large generative-AI ecosystem.
Notes: Candidate because revenue attribution is shared with transformers, GPUs, and product platforms.

Paper_or_discovery: Bitcoin: a peer-to-peer electronic cash system
Authors: Satoshi Nakamoto
Billionaire_rationale: Bitcoin created a cryptoasset and blockchain ecosystem with trillion-dollar-scale market capitalization at times.
Notes: Candidate kept outside normal institutional science publishing.

Paper_or_discovery: Human-level control through deep reinforcement learning; Mastering the game of Go with deep neural networks and tree search
Authors: Volodymyr Mnih; Koray Kavukcuoglu; David Silver; Alex Graves; Ioannis Antonoglou; Daan Wierstra; Martin Riedmiller; et al.; David Silver; Aja Huang; Chris J. Maddison; Arthur Guez; Laurent Sifre; George van den Driessche; Julian Schrittwieser; Ioannis Antonoglou; et al.
Billionaire_rationale: Deep RL and AlphaGo changed AI research and expectations for control, robotics, optimization, and game AI.
Notes: Candidate because direct commercial revenue is harder to isolate than transformers or vision models.
